title: vault-config.yaml — callouts section
description: Canonical input contract for `scripts/vault-config-writer.py callouts`. The writer renders the top-level `callouts:` block of vault-config.yaml from this JSON, replacing any previous block while leaving the rest of the file byte-for-byte untouched.

enabled.description: Master toggle. enabled=false makes Tomo ignore all callouts.

editable.description: Callout types Tomo may read, insert into, or update. Map of name → description.

protected.description: Read-only callout types (typically wrap DataviewJS or plugin output). Tomo never writes inside.

ignore.description: Decorative callouts Tomo skips entirely (no read, no write).

callout_bucket.description: Map keyed by callout type name (matches `> [!name]`); value is a short description.
